body:
HOW TO GET THIS UPDATE (v3.17)

Always use the same download link from your original Gumroad email. Open that email and click the same link — it will automatically download the latest version (3.17).

You NEVER need to purchase again to receive updates.

Stable Release 3.17

What's New

WebView
- Fixed appearance properties behavior for the WebView widget.

General
- Minor bug fixes and overall stability improvements.

Licensing
- Corrected third-party licenses.

---

Previous Version — 3.16

Stable Release 3.16

What's New

Project
- Added new Maximized option in Project Properties, allowing applications to start with the main window maximized.

WebView
- All WebView properties are now available in the Appearance panel for easier configuration.

Images
- Remote Web Images Support: You can now load images directly from the internet by pasting an http:// or https:// link into the Image widget Path / URL property.
- Supports static images and animated GIFs.
- Includes smart caching (images are automatically downloaded to temporary files).
- Images can also be updated dynamically via code: find_widget("my_image").set_source("https://...")

Input Widget
- Added input masks in the Input widget under Properties → Widget Specific, allowing formatted input (e.g., phone numbers, dates, etc.).

Plugins
- Added new plugin: dynamic_list_box — a flexible container that automatically arranges widgets using dynamic layouts.
- Includes demo project showing how to populate and manage items via code.

Details
- Ideal for applications that need to display an unknown or variable number of items with mouse scrolling.
- Internally uses a ScrollArea with a dynamic layout that automatically adjusts the container size.

Documentation
- Master Prompt updated to version V13.

Bug Fixes
- Fixed discrepancy in default styles for splitter panels and docks.
- Fixed appearance properties behavior for the Splitter widget.

---

Previous Version — 3.15

Stable Release 3.15

What's New

Editor
- Code Editor Integration: The Menu Builder plugin and internal wizards now use the advanced CodeEditor instead of plain text areas, adding support for syntax highlighting, line numbers, and smart indentation.
- Editor Stability Fix: Fixed a bug in the CodeEditor that caused erratic scrolling and jumping when selecting text.

---

Previous Version — 3.14

Stable Release 3.14

What's New

# v12 Master Prompt
- New section: runtime Qt widget creation from global_code (QLabel, QPushButton, QFrame) — refs, deleteLater(), callbacks.
- New rule: rect always requires exactly 4 values [x, y, width, height].

Manual
- New section: The win Pattern.
- Prompt updated to v11.

Demos
- dynamic_widgets_demo.json — NxN QLabel color grid.
- dynamic_widgets_demo2.json — 4 pages: badges, animated progressbars, buttons with callbacks, QFrame cards with child labels.

---

Previous Version — 3.12

Stable Release 3.12

Library Manager

New options and improvements.

Added
- Added Clean Build option in Build Configuration: compiles your project in a clean isolated environment.

Documentation
- New Update V8 to the Master Prompt in Section 9 of manual.html.

Bug Fixes
- Fixed import scanner: replaced regex with AST parser for reliable detection.
- Fixed an issue where Check Updates incorrectly flagged CORE libraries (requests, certifi, etc.) as upgradeable.
- Fixed detection of third-party libraries imported in the user global code.
- Fixed splitters not resizing correctly when the window is maximized with anchors/resize enabled.
- Fixed drag-and-drop and copy-paste into splitter panes.
- Fixed: Library Manager not showing USER libraries when project was opened from a different directory.

---

Previous Version — 3.11

Stable Release 3.11

Added
- Project Sanitizer: automatically detects and repairs malformed widgets on project load (missing props, invalid rect formats, broken children structures). Common issue with AI-generated projects.

Documentation
- New Update V7 to the Master Prompt in Section 9 of manual.html.

Bug Fixes
- Fixed WebView html_content not being applied when loading project preview.
- Added setHtml() with qrc:/ base URL, fixing QWebChannel (qt.webChannelTransport) availability in JavaScript.

---

Previous Version — 3.10

Stable Release 3.10

Added
- Added new demo: Clipboard Manager (in Demos).
- New Update V7 to the Master Prompt in Section 9 of manual.html (added container context with scroll).

UI/UX
- Changed the main window size to 1600x900 with better scaling for smaller screens.
- Reduced Debug Console height from 150px to 100px to free up workspace.
- Added more spacing in the Properties panel for better usability.

Bug Fixes
- Fixed text rendering in the FileDropZone widget.
- Added text properties to the FileDropZone widget that were previously hardcoded.

---

Previous Version — 3.09

Stable Release 3.09

Added
- Added the Multimedia widget to the Master Prompt V6 in Section 9 of manual.html.
- Added new demo: demo_ambient_sounds.json.

Bug Fixes
- Fixed a bug in the Timer widget.

---

Previous Version — 3.08

Stable Release 3.08

Added
- Added tips at the start of the program.
- Added local HTML file support for the WebView widget via the properties panel.

Bug Fixes
- Resolved compilation and preview crashes caused by missing widget properties.
- Fixed other minor bugs and stability issues.

UI/UX
- Synchronized the Quick Font controls with the main Font Picker in the Properties panel.

Documentation
- Updated the Master Prompt in Section 9 to version V4 (font rules improvements).

---

Previous Version — 3.07

Stable Release 3.07

Bug Fixes
- Resolved compilation and preview crashes caused by missing widget properties.
- Fixed other minor bugs and stability issues.

UI/UX
- Synchronized the Quick Font controls with the main Font Picker in the Properties panel.

Documentation
- Updated the Master Prompt in Section 9 to version V4 (font rules improvements).

---

Previous Version — 3.06

Stable Release 3.06

Fixed
- Fixed a bug that generated duplicate entries in the Menu Builder plugin.
- Fixed an issue where the default Windows button style disappeared after changing the font.

Added
- Added hover effect in Properties → Appearance.

Documentation
- The Master Prompt included in version 3.05 allows generating full projects with AI.
- The new Master Prompt in 3.06 allows generating custom EasyPyDesktop plugins.
- Together, these tools give users the ability to quickly create complete projects and custom plugins with AI assistance.
- Remember: always place generated plugins in the `plugins_user` folder, so they are preserved during updates or new installations.

---

Previous Version — 3.05

Stable Release 3.05

Added
- Conditional Math Logic Wizard.
- Array / List Manager (In-Memory).
- New demo: demo_new_logic_command.json.

Details
- Build complex interactive logic with zero code.
- Perform math operations on persistent variables.
- Advanced state management without writing code.
